title: bidens pilosa f. discoidea
intro: Bidens pilosa f. discoidea, also known as the hairy beggartick or hairy tickseed, is a flowering plant species that is a variant of the Bidens pilosa plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting against microbial infections, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Bidens pilosa f. discoidea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
